notes: First tournament in a series: six entrants. rosterRole optional (defaults to new on load). Match ports to pnpm --filter ai start:six (3100–3105).

players.name: alice.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Play tit-for-tat: cooperate first, then copy the opponent's previous move.

players.name: bob.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Always cooperate unless they defected twice in a row; then defect once.

players.name: carol.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Grim trigger: cooperate until the first defect, then always defect.

players.name: dave.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Alternate cooperate and defect regardless of history.

players.name: erin.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Randomly choose cooperate or defect with equal probability each round.
